svg.text: PRINT AT 100% / ACTUAL SIZE (disable "fit to page" / scaling).
Then verify the 100 mm bar below with a real ruler before trusting it.
1 mm grid | heavy lines every 5 mm | labels every 10 mm (units: mm)
0.5 mm divisions over 20 mm (near print-resolution limit — use only at higher mag):
1. Place this sheet under the microscope; focus on the 1 mm grid.
2. Click Calibrate… and drag a line across as MANY whole mm as you can see
(e.g. corner label 0 to 10) — a longer span = a more accurate result.
3. Enter that real length in µm (10 mm = 10000 µm). Then use Measure.
